summary: Iteration 12 - All new features tested successfully. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new features verified - expanded strategies (29 forex, 29 crypto), combo mode, new timeframes, R:R ratio, 2FA setup, custom strategy builder, USD trading mode, signal-to-trade push, auth rebranding.

backend: Forex strategies include ICT, SMC, MSNR, CRT, FVG+OB, BOS, CHoCH, liquidity_grab, kill_zones
Crypto strategies include onchain, whale_tracking, orderbook, funding_rate, open_interest, liquidation_zones
Each strategy has id, name, and description
POST /api/auth/2fa/setup returns QR code and secret for TOTP
GET /api/strategies/custom returns user's custom strategies array
POST /api/strategies/custom creates new custom combo strategy
POST /api/signals/generate with custom R:R ratio works
GET /api/market/live returns crypto, forex, indian data
frontend: Auth page shows 'LOG IN TO' text
Auth page shows 'Titan Trade' branding
Signals page loads with data-testid='signals-page'
Timeframe toggles visible with all 13 timeframes (1m,3m,5m,10m,15m,30m,1H,2H,3H,4H,1D,3D,1W)
New timeframes visible: 1m, 3m, 10m, 30m, 2H, 3H, 3D
Combo mode toggle visible and functional
Advanced options toggle visible
R:R Ratio input visible in Advanced Options
Profit Target input visible in Advanced Options
Forex strategies dropdown shows ICT, SMC, MSNR, CRT, FVG+OB, BOS, CHoCH
Crypto strategies dropdown shows On-Chain, Whale Activity, Order Book, Liquidity Heatmaps, Funding Rate, Open Interest
Combo strategies selector visible when Combo mode ON
Multiple strategies can be selected in combo mode
Settings page loads with Security settings card
Enable 2FA button visible
2FA QR code displayed after clicking Enable 2FA
2FA code input visible
Verify 2FA button visible
Strategy Builder page loads with data-testid='strategy-builder-page'
Strategy name input visible
Strategy selector visible with all strategies
Save Custom Strategy button visible
Trade page loads with data-testid='trade-page'
Size Mode toggle visible (Units/USD)
Units and USD buttons visible
Instrument select visible
BUY and SELL buttons visible
Execute as Trade button visible on forex signals for Titan plan users

combo_mode.description: Users can select multiple strategies to combine (e.g., ICT + SMC + CRT)

rr_ratio.description: Manual R:R ratio input in Advanced Options (e.g., 1:2.5)

custom_strategy_builder.description: Users can create custom combo strategies by combining multiple techniques

usd_based_trading.description: Trade page has Units/USD size mode toggle

signal_to_trade_push.description: 'Execute as Trade' button visible on forex signals for Titan plan users

auth_rebranding.description: Auth page shows 'LOG IN TO' and 'Titan Trade' branding

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 verified all new features: 1) Expanded strategies - 29 forex strategies (ICT, SMC, MSNR, CRT, FVG+OB, BOS, CHoCH, etc.) and 29 crypto strategies (On-Chain, Whale Activity, Order Book, Funding Rate, Open Interest, etc.). 2) Combo mode - users can select multiple strategies to combine. 3) New timeframes - 1m, 3m, 10m, 30m, 2H, 3H, 3D added (total 13 timeframes). 4) R:R ratio - manual input in Advanced Options. 5) 2FA - TOTP-based with QR code generation, setup/verify/disable endpoints working. 6) Custom Strategy Builder - full CRUD for custom combo strategies. 7) USD-based trading - Units/USD toggle on Trade page. 8) Signal-to-trade push - 'Execute as Trade' button on forex signals for Titan plan. 9) Auth rebranding - 'LOG IN TO Titan Trade' branding. All APIs are LIVE (no mocking).
